description: Per-API service health (p95 latency, error rate) and the publish pipeline, sourced from Application Insights (appi-ic-hack). cloud_RoleName is the OpenTelemetry service.name each host sets via AddServiceDefaults.
title: IC — Service health & publish pipeline

azureLogAnalytics.query:
requests
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| summarize p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) by cloud_RoleName, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc

requests
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| summarize total = count(), failures = countif(success == false) by cloud_RoleName, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| extend error_rate_pct = iff(total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * failures / total, 1))
| project timestamp, cloud_RoleName, error_rate_pct
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Publish pipeline duration (ms)
panels.description: Available now: worker-side processing duration (claim -> ready) from the ic.biller.publication.duration histogram. The full request-to-worker-ready measurement needs the follow-up publish-lifecycle customEvents linked by a shared deployment_id — see the commented KQL in this panel's query and infra/grafana/README.md.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name == "ic.biller.publication.results"
| extend outcome = tostring(customDimensions.outcome)
| summarize results = sum(value) by outcome, bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
